phases.title: CLI Bootstrap & Basic Command Routing
phases.description: Initialize project structure and implement basic agent orchestration commands.

tasks.title: Initialize project manifest and config
tasks.description: Create package.json and tsconfig.json with required dependencies and settings.

tasks.title: Implement execution utility
tasks.description: Create src/utils/exec.ts with runAgent and runGate functions.

tasks.title: Implement CLI entry point
tasks.description: Create src/cli.ts using Commander to route commands.

tasks.title: Implement specify command
tasks.description: Create src/commands/specify.ts to orchestrate agent specification.

tasks.title: Implement plan command
tasks.description: Create src/commands/plan.ts to orchestrate agent planning.

phases.title: Plan Parsing and Task Generation
phases.description: Implement markdown parsing and automatic gate generation from plan.md.

tasks.title: Implement markdown parser
tasks.description: Create src/utils/parser.ts to extract phases and tasks from plan.md.

tasks.title: Implement gate generator
tasks.description: Create src/utils/gate-gen.ts to emit executable .sh scripts from assertions.

tasks.title: Implement plan-to-tasks command
tasks.description: Create src/commands/plan-to-tasks.ts to orchestrate parsing and gate generation.

phases.title: Task Management & Enforcement
phases.description: Implement task state persistence and the hard-gate enforcement loop.

tasks.title: Implement state service
tasks.description: Create src/utils/state.ts for atomic Zod-validated state persistence.

tasks.title: Implement tasks done command
tasks.description: Create src/commands/tasks.ts with the 'done' subcommand to enforce gates.

tasks.title: E2E Bootstrapping verification
tasks.description: Implement VR-001 E2E test verifying a full loop from plan to tasks done.
